name: accounting firms managing 10–20 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual tracking of subscription renewals causes missed payments. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals for clients
